items.title: Custom hooks for reusable logic: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? Calling the same custom hook in two components automatically shares one state instance.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Custom hooks share logic, not state; each call has its own hook state unless both connect to shared external data.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Custom hooks share logic, not state; each call has its own hook state unless both connect to shared external data.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked React: Component-Based Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
